steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The researcher claims some lakes have seen a decline in ice duration between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. The answer must show a specific lake with fewer ice days in the mid-2000s than in the early 1980s.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: shows an increase in ice days over the period, contradicting the claimed decline. ✗
  • Choice B: compares lakes by latitude rather than showing change over time for one lake. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Kitusjärvi: fewer ice days in 2005–06 than in 1980–81': directly demonstrates a decline over the claimed period. ✓
  • Choice D: describes a pattern unrelated to the early-1980s-to-mid-2000s decline. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
